summary: Tested Database Management features on Settings page (/admin/smtp-settings). All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified - Database Management card visible with all buttons (Export Database, Email Backup, Full Backup, Delete Email Logs, Delete WhatsApp Logs, Factory Reset). Factory Reset button correctly disabled until RESET is typed.

minor.issue: Duplicate route definition in server.py (lines 11790 and 11881). First route returns 'Deleted X logs' without deleted_count field, second route returns both message and deleted_count. First route takes precedence.

action_items: Consider removing duplicate DELETE /api/whatsapp-logs route at line 11790 in server.py to use the one at line 11881 which returns deleted_count field
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate route definition for DELETE /api/whatsapp-logs - one at line 11790 (clear_whatsapp_logs) and one at line 11881 (delete_whatsapp_logs). The first one takes precedence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database Management features fully tested. Key findings: 1) Settings page is at /admin/smtp-settings (NOT /admin/settings). 2) All Database Management APIs work correctly: DELETE /api/email-logs, DELETE /api/whatsapp-logs, POST /api/database/factory-reset, POST /api/database/send-email-backup, GET /api/database/backup-settings, PUT /api/database/backup-settings, GET /api/database/backup-history, GET /api/database/export, POST /api/database/trigger-backup. 3) Frontend data-testid attributes verified: database-management-card, export-database-btn, send-email-backup-btn, trigger-full-backup-btn, delete-email-logs-btn, delete-whatsapp-logs-btn, factory-reset-confirm-input, factory-reset-btn. 4) Factory Reset button correctly disabled until user types RESET.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/database/export: PASS - Returns JSON with collections, export_date, exported_by
Backend API Tests.POST /api/database/factory-reset: PASS - Returns message and deleted summary
Backend API Tests.POST /api/database/send-email-backup: PASS - Returns message (may fail if SMTP not configured)

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real. Email backup may fail if SMTP not configured in test environment.
